name: Xheko Imperial Luxury Hotel & Spa
description:
Set 1 km from Sheshi Skënderbej square, this elegant hotel is also 1 km from 18th-century Et'hem Bey Mosque and 2 km from the National Museum of History.
 Refined rooms offer free Wi-Fi, flat-screens and safes, plus minibars and tea and coffeemaking facilities. Suites add sitting areas, fireplaces and marble bathrooms with soaking tubs.
 Amenities include a sophisticated restaurant, an opulent lobby bar and a rooftop bar/restaurant. There's also meeting and event space. Breakfast is available for a surcharge.
address: Rruga Ibrahim Rugova Nr.56/H2 Tirana AL, 1019, Albania

name: The Plaza
description:
Set in a sleek building with a distinctive geometric facade, this plush hotel in the city center is 18 km from Tirana International Airport, a 5-minute walk from the National Art Gallery and 4 km from shopping at Tirana Ring Center.
 Chic rooms with wood floors and glass-walled bathrooms feature flat-screen TVs, free Wi-Fi and minibars. Upgraded rooms add Nespresso machines and city views. Suites have living rooms, and some offer whirlpool tubs, steam rooms and/or gyms. Apartments come with kitchenettes.
 Amenities include 3 upscale international restaurants and a bar, as well as a luxe spa and a fitness center. An airport shuttle is available.

name: Tirana International Hotel & Conference Center
description:
Across from Sheshi Skënderbej plaza in the city center, this relaxed conference hotel along Bulevardi Zogu I is a 2-minute walk from themed exhibitions at the Muzeu Historik Kombëtar and 6 minutes' walk from the Teatri Kombëtar.
 Straightforward rooms come with free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and minibars, as well as city views. Suites add separate sitting areas. Room service is available.
 Breakfast and parking are complimentary. Other amenities include 2 airy restaurants (1 with a terrace) and a bar. There's also an indoor pool and a spa, plus a gym and a 24-hour business center. A conference center features 15 meeting rooms.

name: Hilton Garden Inn Tirana
description:
Set in a modern building overlooking Dajti Mountain and the River Lana, this trendy hotel is 3 km from the centrally located Skanderbeg Square and 4 km from the National Museum of History.
 Bright, contemporary rooms free Wi-Fi, plus flat-screen TVs, and tea and coffee-making equipment. Some add balconies with mountain or river views. Suites have separate living areas with pullout sofas. Room service is available.
 Breakfast is available. Amenities include a bar, a 24-hour market and an airy restaurant with terrace dining. The business center is open 24/7. There's a coin-operated laundry.

name: Rogner Hotel Tirana
description:
Surrounded by a 3-hectare Mediterranean garden, this refined hotel is a 10-minute walk from Skanderbeg Square and a 12-minute walk from the Et'hem Bey Mosque.
 The chic rooms with wood floors feature boulevard or garden views, free high-speed Internet and flat-screen TVs, as well as minibars, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. Suites add designer toiletries and separate living rooms with sofabeds; some feature balconies. There's room service.
 Amenities include an elegant restaurant, a spa, and a lounge bar with live music. There's also a tennis court, a gym, a putting green, and an outdoor pool with a bar.
address: Golden Eagle Shpk, Bulevardi Dëshmorët e Kombit 9, Tiranë 1010, Albania

name: Sky Hotel Tirana
description:
In a modern tower on a shopping street, this relaxed hotel is 9 minutes' walk from the Grand Park of Tirana, a 14-minute walk from the National History Museum and 19 km from Tirana International Airport.
 Warm, informal rooms have Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs. Suites provide living rooms. Room service is available.
 Amenities include a restaurant, a coffee shop and a bar, as well as a fitness room and a sauna. There's also parking, breakfast and an area shuttle.

name: Tirana Marriott
description:
Next to Air Albania Stadium, this upscale hotel is 1 km from both Tiranës Lake and Skanderbeg Square. Tirana International Airport is 18 km away.
 Polished rooms offer TVs, Wi-Fi and sitting areas, as well as minifridges and coffeemakers. Upgraded rooms add access to a lounge with drinks and snacks. Suites feature separate living rooms; some have lake views. Room service is available 24/7.
 There's a casual restaurant and a 24-hour fitness center, plus event and meeting space. Breakfast and parking are available.

name: MAK Hotel Tirana
description:
This sleek hotel is 2 km from the National Museum of History, Skanderbeg Square and the Grand Park of Tirana.
 Understated rooms and suites offer free Wi-Fi, satellite TV and minibars, plus safes, and tea and coffeemaking equipment. Some have sitting areas, balconies and/or kitchenettes. Upgraded quarters provide access to a club lounge with free breakfast, snacks and drinks. Room service is available 24/7.
 Dining options consist of 2 restaurants, a cafe/bar and a pool bar. Other amenities include an indoor pool, a shopping mall and a gym, plus an outdoor pool, and meeting and event space. Breakfast, parking and massage services are available.

description: ★4.8 across 867 reviews in Sarandë. Highlights: Vacation, Friends, Luxury.

name: Santa Quaranta "Premium Resort"
description:
In a grand whitewashed building on the Ionian Sea, this polished hotel along the SH 81 state road is a 7-minute walk from Mango Beach, and 5 km from the hilltop ruins of Kalaja e Lëkurësit castle.
 Warmly decorated, understated rooms come with sea views, free Wi-Fi and smart TVs, as well as minibars; some have balconies. Family rooms sleep up to 4 guests, while upgraded rooms add sitting areas and hip, vintage-inspired furnishings.
 A breakfast buffet, parking and the use of sunloungers are complimentary. Other amenities include an outdoor pool, and an airy restaurant with a terrace.

name: Hotel Apollon
description:
Set in a breezy building, this relaxed beachfront hotel is 5 km from both the Bistricë river and the Lëkurësi Castle ruins.
 Straightforward rooms offering balconies with sea views provide Wi-Fi, minibars and satellite TV. Room service is available.
 Parking is complimentary. Other amenities include a polished restaurant with sea views and a terrace, plus a bar, and a private beach with umbrellas and sunloungers. Breakfast is available.

name: Saranda Palace
description:
Set off Rruga Ismali Qemali road, this modest hotel overlooking the sea is 14 minutes by foot from the port, and 5 km from the hilltop Lëkurësi Castle.
 The relaxed rooms and suites come with complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, minibars, and balconies; some feature sea views.
 There's an outdoor pool with sunloungers, in addition to direct access to the beach.

name: Demi Hotel
description:
This relaxed hotel facing the Ionian Sea in an area surrounded by beachfront bars and cafes is 2 km from Saranda Ferry Terminal for boats to Corfu Island. It's also 3 km from Lëkurësi Castle with sweeping views and an airy eatery.
 Streamlined rooms with a modern vibe offer Wi-Fi access and flat-screen TVs, plus minibars and safes. All have en suite bathrooms. Upgraded rooms feature sofabeds and balconies with sea views. Room service is available.
 Breakfast (fee) is offered. Other amenities include a beachfront restaurant serving Mediterranean cuisine, and a lively bar with a resident DJ. Parking is available.
